title: My Journey Learning Linux
excerpt: From a complete beginner to navigating the terminal with confidence — how Linux changed the way I think about computers and opened the door to the world of open-source.

title: Getting Started with Docker
excerpt: Containers demystified — a practical intro to Docker, images, and volumes. Learn how to containerize an application from scratch and why every developer should know this tool.

title: Introduction to Cloud Computing
excerpt: What exactly is the cloud and why does it matter? Explore the core concepts of cloud computing — IaaS, PaaS, SaaS — and how platforms like Azure are reshaping the software industry.

title: Building a Hybrid Grapple Mechanic in Unity 3D
excerpt: How I implemented a grapple system that lets the player swing like a pendulum or pull to a point — using Unity's Rigidbody, SpringJoint, and tagged grapple objects in the scene.
